command.cobbledollars_villagers_overhaul: Shift+right-click a villager to assign config shop
Look at a villager, wandering trader, or Trainer Association to open the shop.
Shift+right-click a villager to remove config shop
config.cobbledollars_villagers_overhaul_: CobbleDollars scale: 1 = 250 CD, 2 = 500 CD, 3 = 750 CD per emerald. Or use raw value (250, 500, 750). Ignored if sync with bank is enabled.
Use 'Edit currencies' to add items (hold in hand or browse list), set values, and save. No config file editing required.
Use 'Edit currencies' for a visual editor. Or edit JSON: [{"item":"id","value":250}]. Empty [] = use custom_currency.json.

When enabled, trades that cost 1 emerald (minimum after curing/discounts) are free - no CobbleDollars charged. Note: Trades where reputation reduces emerald cost to 0 (e.g. 0 emeralds + 1 book) are always free - no CobbleDollars charged for the emerald part.
Sync Emerald Rate with CobbleDollars Bank
Use emerald price from CobbleDollars bank.json if found.
gui.cobbledollars_villagers_overhaul_rca: Left-click to select & edit price • Right-click to remove
Left-click to select & edit value • Right-click to remove
Hold an item in your hand first
Set CobbleDollars value per item for villager item-for-item trades. Left-click to select • Right-click to remove
Starting a new series will reset your progress!
Completing a series permanently increases luck.
Left-click to select & edit price • Right-click to remove
